nasb.text: Then the sons of Israel said to Samuel, “Do not cease to cry to the Lord our God for us, that He may save us from the hand of the Philistines.”

esv.text: And the people of Israel said to Samuel, “Do not cease to cry out to the Lord our God for us, that he may save us from the hand of the Philistines.”

cnv.text: 以色列人對撒母耳說：“請你不要靜默，為我們呼求耶和華我們的　神吧，好叫他拯救我們脫離非利士人的手。”

ccb.text: 他们对撒母耳说：“请你为我们不停地呼求我们的上帝耶和华，求祂从非利士人手中拯救我们。”
